name: Ollie the Sheep
description:
[] Ollie the Sheep []

A lone local resident of the small town of "Blackwood", Ollie the Sheep, went outside late at night to gather firewood to keep the fire warm In the house, when the last harvest was not enough for two weeks. She dressed warmly, took an axe, prepared a sledge and headed into the thicket of the forest, lighting her way with a kerosene lantern.
creator: HollowRuss
